_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to simplify algebraic products and quotients using the laws of exponents.

_source.w: We are learning to simplify algebraic products and quotients using the laws of exponents.
y: Exponent laws provide powerful tools for simplifying complex algebraic expressions efficiently.
Fluency with these laws is essential for scientific notation, exponential functions and logarithms.
These skills are fundamental to chemistry (molar calculations), physics (equations of motion) and computer science (algorithm complexity).
